titleStmt.title: SII 9.25: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 25. (A.R. No. 728 of 1916.) ON A SLAB IN THE TEMPLE OF CHOLARAJA AT MADAKASIRA, MADAKASIRA TALUK ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 870, Kīlaka (= A.D. 948-49). It refers itself to the reign of the Noḻamba-Pallava king Dilīparasa. Kiṟiya-Ponnayya, the servant of Ballaha is stated to have led an army against Gajāṁkuśa-Chōḻa and after Dilīpa-Noḻamba joined it the former fought and died in the battle of Ibīḻi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . sakanṛpakāḷātītasaṁvatsarasataṅgaḷeṇṭunūṟa Eḻpattaṟa kīlakasaṁvatsaraṁ pra
varttise © svasti samadhigatapañcamahāsabda pallavānva
ya śrīpṛthivīvallabha pallavakulatilaka pallavarāma palaro
ḍegaṇḍa Iṟivanoḻaṁbanēkavākhya śrīmat dilīparasa priti
vīrājyaṅgeyyuttire cikkayyaṅgaṁ Ācabbegaṁ puṭṭida bikiyaṇṇa Ātaniṁ kiṟi
yaṁ mūvatticcāsirada billavelgaṇḍasima
yinda kiṟiyaponnayya ballahana besadāḷu gajānkusacōḻana mēge daṇḍu
vōgalu dilīpanoḻaṁba daṇḍinalu koḍi Ibīḻida kāḷegadalu Āḻdana besa
vēḍi sattaṁ ponnayya .
Digital edition of SII 9.25 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
